verdict: An exceptionally fluid and satisfying intermediate chart with superb rhythmic alignment and stellar physical flow, held back only by slightly repetitive stream patterns in the verses.

issues.problem: The U-D-R-L stream pattern is repeated 5.5 times consecutively. While highly comfortable and physically fluent, repeating the exact same 4-note sequence for over 5 seconds feels slightly monotonous and could benefit from some directional variation.
The L-U-D-R pattern is repeated 7 times consecutively, making the stream feel overly copy-pasted and repetitive despite its great physical comfort.
